// Game logic — AI, win detection, star rating
export const WIN_LINES=[[0,1,2],[3,4,5],[6,7,8],[0,3,6],[1,4,7],[2,5,8],[0,4,8],[2,4,6]];/** Returns winning symbol ('X'|'O'), 'draw', or null */export function checkResult(board){for(const[a,b,c]of WIN_LINES){if(board[a]&&board[a]===board[b]&&board[a]===board[c])return board[a];}return board.every(Boolean)?'draw':null;}/** Returns indices of the winning line, or [] */export function getWinLine(board){for(const line of WIN_LINES){const[a,b,c]=line;if(board[a]&&board[a]===board[b]&&board[a]===board[c])return line;}return[];}/** minimax with alpha-beta pruning */function minimax(board,isMax,alpha,beta,depth){const result=checkResult(board);if(result==='O')return 10-depth;if(result==='X')return depth-10;if(result==='draw')return 0;if(isMax){let best=-Infinity;for(let i=0;i<9;i++){if(!board[i]){board[i]='O';best=Math.max(best,minimax(board,false,alpha,beta,depth+1));board[i]=null;alpha=Math.max(alpha,best);if(beta<=alpha)break;}}return best;}else{let best=Infinity;for(let i=0;i<9;i++){if(!board[i]){board[i]='X';best=Math.min(best,minimax(board,true,alpha,beta,depth+1));board[i]=null;beta=Math.min(beta,best);if(beta<=alpha)break;}}return best;}}/** Perfect AI move index */function bestMove(board){let best=-Infinity,idx=-1;for(let i=0;i<9;i++){if(!board[i]){board[i]='O';const score=minimax(board,false,-Infinity,Infinity,0);board[i]=null;if(score>best){best=score;idx=i;}}}return idx;}/** Semi-smart: sometimes picks suboptimal move */function normalMove(board){if(Math.random()<0.25)return randomMove(board);return bestMove(board);}function randomMove(board){const empty=board.map((v,i)=>v?null:i).filter(i=>i!==null);return empty[Math.floor(Math.random()*empty.length)];}/**
 * Get AI move index for a given difficulty level and stage.
 * difficulty: 'easy' | 'normal' | 'impossible'
 * stage: 1-15
 */export function getAIMove(board,difficulty){let stage=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:1;const empty=board.map((v,i)=>v?null:i).filter(i=>i!==null);if(empty.length===0)return null;if(difficulty==='easy'){// Stage 1-5: fully random; 6-10: small chance of smart; 11-15: ~30% smart
const smartChance=stage<=5?0:stage<=10?0.1:0.3;return Math.random()<smartChance?normalMove(board):randomMove(board);}if(difficulty==='normal'){// Stage 1-5: random; 6-10: ~50% smart; 11-15: ~80% smart
const smartChance=stage<=5?0.1:stage<=10?0.5:0.8;return Math.random()<smartChance?bestMove(board):randomMove(board);}// impossible — always perfect
return bestMove(board);}/** Stars: 3→3 moves, 4→2 moves, 5→1 move, 6+→0 */export function calcStars(moves){if(moves<=3)return 3;if(moves<=4)return 2;if(moves<=5)return 1;return 0;}/** Check if the impossible stage (stage 15) is forced loss/tie */export function isForceImpossibleStage(stage,difficulty){return difficulty==='impossible'&&stage===15;}
